description: Returns a list of information about all users within a group in your Fivetran account.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the group within the Fivetran system.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to fetch per page. Accepts a number in the range 1..1000; the default value is 100.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Indicates whether to return only enabled users (true) or not (false). By default, both enabled (allowed to log in) and suspended users are returned.
